titleStmt.title: SII 4.245: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri

No. 245. (A.R. No. 16 of 1889). Over the inscription are cut the following figures:—in the centre, the Teṅgalai Vaishṇava mark, to its left, the chakra and the Sun and to its right, the sankha and the Moon.ON A STONE TO THE SOUTH OF THE CHINNAHUDIYAM TEMPLE AT HAMPI (VIJAYANAGARA), HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu
1463 neya śā¨rvarisaṁvatsarada kā¨rtika śu 5 guruvāradallu . śrīma(ṁn)nmahārājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra Acutadēvamahārā
yaru vijeyanāgaradallū ratnasiṁhvāsanāṟūḍharāgi pruthvīrājyaṁ ge
yUtta(ṁ)miralu kāśyapagōtrada Āpastaṁbasūtrada harigiya
hiriyaAbbarājagaḷa makkaḷu ti(ṁ)mmarājagaḷu pratiṣṭeya māḍidu
varadājaṁmanapaṭaṇada mūḍalu penuguṁḍebāgila baḷi
yalli śrīraghunāthadēvaranu pratiṣṭeyanu māḍi yī dēvarige Amruta
paḍige sama¨rpista kṣētragaḷa vivara neḷalahuṇiseyeṁba sa¨rvamā(ṁ)nya
da Agrāhāradallū sa¨rvvakratugaḷiṁda muṁmaḍidīkṣitarige krayavāgi
baṁda vrittigaḷanūnāU Ā muṁmaḍidīkṣitara kaiyalu krayadāna
vāgi koṁḍa vritti 2 yī yeraḍuvrittige salluva sthaḷagaḷa vivara kāluveke
ḷage koṭigeyavara paṁcakada sthaḷe 1kke bījavari kha 0 . 1 kagallasthaḷa 1kke
bījavari kha ¢ 4 Asagarahaḷḷada sthaḷa 1 kke mūlegadde bījavari kha ¢ 3
bīranapaṁcakada sthaḷa 1kke bījavari kha 0 . 2 Aṁttu sthaḷa 4kke gadde kha 1
Akṣāradalū khaṁḍugada gaddeyanū śrīraghunāthadēvara Amruta
paḍige sama¨rpisideU . yī dēvara Amrutapaḍige sama¨rpista mā(ṁ)nyagaḷa
vivara kaḷasāpurada māgaṇege saluva rēvatāpurada grāmadallū hā
ḷakāluveya keḷage sēnebōva viruparasanu māḍuva jaUginagaddesthaḷaU
kha 0 . 1 kaṁpileyalū sātāsirumayana bāḷeyatōṭasthaḷada gadde kha ¢ . 3 dha¨r(ṁ)
masāgaradalli keṟikeḷage saṁgaṇagaUḍana sthaḷada gadde kha 0 . 3 voḍḍina baḷiyaṇa
basavāpurada grāmadalli sēnabovahonnarasayana mā(ṁ)nyava hoṁdida he
ggaḍeya sthaḷada gadde kha 0 ¢ 3 yellagauṁḍana sthaḷada gadde kha 0 ¢ 3 Ubhayaṁ gadde kha 0 . 1
kruṣṇāpuradallū lakumarasanāyakkana maḷigeya hōbaḷige saluva Ā ma
ḷigeya hiṁdaṇa gaddesthaḷa bījavari kha 0 ¢ 2 . kāmalāpurada keṟiyakeḷage
hūvinasiddayana sthaḷada gadde kha 0 ¢ 3 mādalāpurada grāmada keṟevoḷage Ū
ṭakāluvestaḷadallū lakumayya ho(ṁ)nnayya mallayyagaḷa gadde kha 0 . 1 Anaṁ
ttāpuradalli keṟekeḷage gaUḍara mallayyanu māḍuva tuṁbinasthaḷada gadde kha 0 ¢ 3
kāyimallayya māḍuva jaUgina sthaḷada gadde kha 0 ¢ 4 Ubhayaṁ gadde kha 0 . 2 Aṁ
ttū mā(ṁ)nyageḷāgi sama¨rpisiddu grāma 8 kke gadde bījavari kha 2 ¢ 1 . krayavā
gi koṁḍu sama¨rpisiddu neḷalahuṇiseya Agrāhāradallū vritti 2 kke gadde kha 1
yeraḍu vrittige saluva teṁginamaragaḷanu sama¨rpisideŪ . yī dha¨r(ṁ)mmakke Āru
Anukūlavādavarugaḷige Anēkaśatasahasrapu(ṁ)ṇyaṁgaḷu Uṁṭu yī dha¨r(ṁ)
mmakke Āru vighnavādavarugaḷige Anēka nāyakanarakadoḷage bīḷuvaru ta(ṁ)mma tāI
taṁdegaḷanu kāśiyalli vadhisida pāpakke hōharu . ślōkagaḷu . dānapālanayō¨rmmadhyē (.)
dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāt sva¨rggamavāpnōti (.) pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ .
svadattād dviguṇaṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svada
ttaṁ ni(ḥ)ṣphalaṁ bhavēt . yī dēvara stānikaru gaUtamagōtrada vayighānasasūtra
da yajuśākheya muḷuvāgila kēśavadēvara stānika raṁdaṇācā¨ryyara maga ciṁnappayanu .
staḷada sēnabōvanu haritagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada rukuśākheya vijayanāgara
da lāyada liṁgarasara maga virupayanu .
Digital edition of SII 4.245 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
